metadata.purpose: Generic AI distribution layer for understanding and using the Bit System with minimal ambiguity.

contracts.purpose: Package entrypoint, trust model, reading order, and file map.
Global system rules, precedence, and anti-patterns.
Canonical list of layout primitives and UI components for AI use.
Brand compositions and their allowed contexts.
Agency output contexts, maturity, required sections, and preferred recipes.
Condensed asset guidance for logo, symbol, and icon selection.

global_rules: Use semantic tokens in new implementation work.
Use Inconsolata for body and UI.
Use at most one primary neon CTA per viewport.
Prefer current assets and avoid legacy assets in new work.
Trust JSON contracts over HTML showcase pages.
